method.baseline: mutation burden (negative Hamming from the train-set consensus window)
method.benchmark: FLIP-AAV (Dallago et al. 2021, NeurIPS D&B; built on Bryant et al. 2021 Nat Biotechnol 10.1038/s41587-020-00793-4); splits: sampled (random 80/20) + mut_des (mutant->designed)
method.metric: Spearman on held-out test; bootstrap (300) CI on learned-minus-baseline gap
